settings.subheading:
Halloween Collection Deal - $11/lb Hard Wax Special 🎃

Your favorite professional-grade waxes at a frightfully good price! For a limited time only, stock up on our top three premium hard waxes - for just $11 per pound.

Choose from the soft pink charm of Rose Garden, tropical teal of Ipanema Aquamarine, or the calming gray of Simpli Zen. Each one delivers silky-smooth results, with low-temperature flexibility and superior hair removal performance.

🕸️ Only 20 bundles available per wax type
🕸️ $11/lb. limited-time price. Offer valid while supplies last

Don’t miss your chance to treat your clients, and yourself, to Bombshell’s best. Once they’re gone, they’re gone!

Buy One, Get One Half Off - 6" Wax Applicators 💥

Double up everyone’s go to waxing essentials, now at an irresistible price! For a limited time only, buy one box of 6" Tongue Depressor Wax Applicators and get the second half off.

Sturdy, splinter-free, and built for effortless control - our applicators are perfect for precise, smooth application of hard or soft wax, especially for large body waxing and brazilian services. Stock up and keep your treatment room fully equipped for the holiday season ahead!

🕸️ Discount automatically applied at checkout
🕸️ Must Select 500 count option

Don’t miss your chance to save on the tools that keep your services running seamlessly. Once they’re gone, they’re gone!

settings.description:
🤠💎 Welcome to the Bombshell Wax Skin Games Dallas Collection. Celebrate The Skin Games – Rhinestone Rodeo with exclusive wax bundles and professional supplies created for estheticians.

🐎✨ Each limited-time kit features Bombshell hard wax, essential waxing tools, Pinky Winky pre & post treatment oil, and Kiss It Goodbye wax remover—giving waxing professionals everything needed to prep, perform, and finish treatments with confidence.

⭐ Skin Games Show Specials Available while supplies last during The Skin Games Dallas event month.

settings.block_content: A superior Beeswax blend, carefully sourced with ethical standards.
Adheres more to the hair and not the skin, leaving the skin feeling soft & supple and clients feeling confident & fresh.
Doing business together, we help animals, people, plants and our planet to thrive.
